misc: Rarely uses his driver, which has raised questions about his masculinity.
biography: Ossi, a competitor known for his strategic play, hails from the esteemed Kullo Golf Club. His presence is always felt at the Hector Trophée, where his calm demeanor often belies a fierce competitive spirit. Off the course, Ossi is known for his quiet intensity and thoughtful approach to the game, traits that have earned him respect among his peers.

Notably, Ossi's reluctance to use his driver has raised some eyebrows and sparked considerable debate among golf aficionados. This unconventional choice has led to whispers and questions, with some even jokingly questioning his masculinity. Despite the chatter, Ossi remains unfazed, sticking to his strengths and strategic preferences.

With three past appearances at the Hector Trophée, Ossi is no stranger to the challenges and unique atmosphere of this event. While the coveted Hector Trophée and the individual Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, Ossi's consistent performance and unwavering dedication suggest that his breakthrough moment may be on the horizon. Hector Trophée 2026 will mark his fourth appearance.
